title: Dalbergaria rubrocincta
taxonomy: Dalbergaria rubrocincta is a flowering plant in the legume family (Fabaceae). It is a species of Dalbergia, a genus of tropical and subtropical trees and shrubs. Dalbergaria rubrocincta is commonly known as the red-banded dalbergia. The classification of this plant is further divided into its kingdom, family, order, class, and other taxonomic ranks. The exact taxonomic classification of Dalbergaria rubrocincta can be specified as follows: kingdom - Plantae, family - Fabaceae, order - Fabales, class - Magnoliopsida.

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress.
